targets.name: TimeSpanParser.TryParse
targets.notes: Identified 2026-05-06. Suffix-dispatch time parser. Per-suffix dispatch properties directly provable.

targets.name: TreeNodeFilter.TokenizeFilter
targets.notes: Identified 2026-05-06. Filter-language tokeniser. Non-empty-token guarantee and separator suppression inside brackets.

targets.name: ValidationResult
targets.notes: Identified 2026-05-06. Readonly struct. Invariant: IsValid <-> ErrorMessage = none. All 5 theorems decide-provable. Best next Task-2/3 candidate.

targets.name: ExitCode enum
targets.notes: Identified 2026-05-06. POSIX range [0,255] explicitly documented. Range check + pairwise distinctness fully decide-provable.

targets.name: TestNodePropertiesCategories
targets.notes: Identified 2026-05-06. FailedProperties subset OutcomeProperties invariant. Disjointness with Discovered. All decide-provable once modelled as finite type.

findings.desc: BUG-1: Single-char quote input -> IndexOf(char, 1, -1) throws ArgumentOutOfRangeException.
BUG-2: Single-char double-quote input -> input[1..^1] range exception.
Unclosed opening quote at start silently discards all input content.
Adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1. Closing quote triggers yield+reset.
Empty option name not rejected: '--:value' produces currentOption='' silently.
OQ-1: Absent required options (Min>0, option missing) not caught; delegated to extension-defined ValidateConfigurationAsync.
OQ-2: KeyNotFoundException if called before ValidateNoUnknownOptions filters unknown option names.
OQ-3: Max==0 case emits 'expects no arguments' instead of general 'at most 0 arguments' — message asymmetry.
OQ-4: Error message says 'expects at least 1 arguments' (incorrect plural).

lean_setup.elan_install_note: Network blocked in sandbox. curl is blocked entirely. Use leanprover/lean4-action in CI. No local lean install possible in this environment.
lean_setup.important_note: String.replace, String.startsWith etc are @[extern] and NOT kernel-reducible. Use native_decide for concrete string evaluation. decide works for pure Prop/Bool/Int without String ops. omega for integer arithmetic.
lean_setup.ci_phase3_check_added: 2026-05-03 in fv-docs-validation.yml; enhanced 2026-05-05 to check .lean files for phase-3+ targets
